mapper.select: SELECT ROLE_NO, ROLE_ID, CPNY_ID, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, UPDATE_DATE, UPDATED_BY, ORDERNO, ACTIVITY, SYS_TYPE FROM sy_role WHERE ROLE_NO = #{roleNo}
SELECT ROLE_NO, ROLE_ID, CPNY_ID, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, UPDATE_DATE, UPDATED_BY, ORDERNO, ACTIVITY, SYS_TYPE FROM sy_role WHERE CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId} AND ACTIVITY = 1 ORDER BY ORDERNO
SELECT ROLE_NO, ROLE_ID, CPNY_ID, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, UPDATE_DATE, UPDATED_BY, ORDERNO, ACTIVITY, SYS_TYPE FROM sy_role WHERE ACTIVITY = 1 ORDER BY ORDERNO

SELECT r.ROLE_NO, r.ROLE_ID, r.CPNY_ID, r.CREATE_DATE, r.CREATED_BY, r.UPDATE_DATE, r.UPDATED_BY, r.ORDERNO, r.ACTIVITY, r.SYS_TYPE FROM sy_role r INNER JOIN sy_role_group_relation rgr ON r.ROLE_NO = rgr.ROLE_NO WHERE rgr.ROLE_GROUP_NO = #{roleGroupNo} AND r.ACTIVITY = 1 AND rgr.ACTIVITY = 1 ORDER BY r.ORDERNO
SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM sy_role WHERE ROLE_NO = #{roleNo} AND ACTIVITY = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE SY_ROLE SET ORDERNO = #{orderNo}, ACTIVITY = #{activity}, SYS_TYPE = #{sysType}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID} WHERE ROLE_NO = #{roleNo}
